title: Migrating from Workers Sites to Pages
excerpt: title: Migrating from Workers Sites to Pages description: Learn how to migrate from Workers Sites to Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this tutorial, you will learn how to migrate an existing [Cloudflare Workers Sites](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/configuration/sites/) application to Cloudflare Pages.
